'''鈭歫-p-dh-ng''' ('''kajapdhengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fike|fike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-p-dh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fike|fike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-p-dh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kajapdhengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijapdhengoko|thijapdhengoko]] || [[word:jijapdhengoko|jijapdhengoko]] || [[word:shijapdhengoko|shijapdhengoko]] || [[word:kijapdhengoko|kijapdhengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujapdhengoko|thuthujapdhengoko]] || [[word:jujujapdhengoko|jujujapdhengoko]] || [[word:shushujapdhengoko|shushujapdhengoko]] || [[word:kukujapdhengoko|kukujapdhengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
